title: oenanthe peucedanifolia var. media
intro: Oenanthe peucedanifolia var. media, also known as water dropwort, is a perennial plant species within the carrot family, native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include alleviating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and fever. In herbal preparations, water dropwort is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to promote respiratory health and relieve symptoms associated with colds and flu.
